policy.default: A source entry approves only research and source-pool eligibility. Concrete project adoption still requires exact asset URL, license, local path, performance, fallback, and QA evidence.

sources.name: Open Doodles

license.name: CC0 / free commercial and personal use per source page

blocked_uses: redistributing as a competing standalone pack
using without exact asset record
adoption_requirements: record exact asset URL or local path
modify or restyle for project fit
sources.notes: Good source for written, artistic, calm, and playful accents.

sources.name: Open Peeps
blocked_uses: using default peeps as final brand identity without restyling
image-only explanations
adoption_requirements: record exact asset URL or local path
sources.notes: Useful for human-friendly flows and non-technical customer guidance.

sources.name: Kenney Assets

license.name: Creative Commons CC0 on checked packs

blocked_uses: assuming every pack without checking its page
shipping uncompressed game assets into marketing pages
adoption_requirements: record exact pack and downloaded files
compress and budget before web use
sources.notes: Best for playful, retro, pixel, and demo-world directions.

sources.name: Quaternius Stylized Nature MegaKit

license.name: Creative Commons Zero v1.0 Universal per itch page

blocked_uses: large model bundles without byte budget
primary content hidden in WebGL
assuming all Quaternius packs without per-pack record
sources.notes: Use only after model optimization and canvas fallback plan.

sources.name: Poly Haven
blocked_uses: copying site text, thumbnails, logos, or metadata beyond license scope
heavy textures without compression
adoption_requirements: keep material decorative unless DOM text mirrors meaning
sources.notes: Good for lighting/material quality when 3D is justified.

sources.name: ambientCG
blocked_uses: shipping large texture sets without budget
using textures as text backgrounds without contrast checks
sources.notes: Useful for real material feel when a flat SVG is not enough.

sources.name: Lucide Icons

license.name: ISC with MIT-derived Feather icons noted by source

blocked_uses: using icons as brand logos
unlabeled icon-only controls without accessible names
sources.notes: Preferred icon source when available in a frontend project.

sources.name: Heroicons
blocked_uses: using as brand marks
mixing with incompatible icon stroke systems
sources.notes: Good fallback when a Tailwind-style icon set is already present.

sources.name: SIL Open Font License
blocked_uses: assuming every free font is OFL
modifying reserved font names without review
sources.notes: Use as the font license standard; each font family still needs its own source record.

sources.name: Haikei

license.name: To be checked before generated output adoption

blocked_uses: using exported output without terms check
treating generator output as source-of-truth asset
sources.notes: Useful as a technique reference. Production use requires terms capture.

sources.name: AstroWind
blocked_uses: copying template sections blindly
adding template dependency without architecture decision
adoption_requirements: use as structure inspiration unless license is captured
sources.notes: Good reference for Astro site organization, but not an approved runtime dependency here.
